title: dysosmia dichotoma
intro: Dysosmia dichotoma, also known as Chinese forked lobelia or forked lobelia, is a plant species belonging to the Lobelia genus in the family Campanulaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce sweating and relieve fever. The plant's roots and leaves are used in herbal preparations to treat various health conditions, including coughs, sore throats, and digestive issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, dysosmia dichotoma is often combined with other herbs to create medicinal teas, infusions, or decoctions to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections.
